data.title: How Liquid I.V. became a top Prime Day seller
data.description: The hydration brand has been a top seller during Amazon's Prime Day event in each of the past three years. Aaron Jones, vice president of ecommerce, gives Digital Commerce 360 insights into how Liquid I.V. has boosted its Amazon sales and the challenges it has faced along the way.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Who is most open to using AI shopping assistants?
data.description: New survey results about AI shopping assistants from YouGov show interest and concerns across generations of U.S. adults.

data.title: Genuine Parts Co. builds digital tariff calculator for customers
data.description: The tool lets customers “understand their specific exposure to tariffs and the solutions we can offer to help them problem solve," the company says.

data.title: Synoligo launches online ordering platform for custom DNA and RNA strands
data.description: The launch reflects broader shifts in the biotech supply chain, where companies are investing in digital tools to make critical research materials.

data.title: Google brings AI updates to its virtual try-on tool
data.description: The wide rollout across Google Search, Images and Shopping will make the try-on tool usable for apparel from Macy’s, Kohl’s and others.
